items.title: Shabnim Ismail reverses retirement and makes South Africa T20 World Cup squad
items.summary: The 37-year-old fast bowler last played international cricket in 2023 but will be on the plane to England this June
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: James unsure over future after Lakers eliminated
items.summary: NBA legend LeBron James says he is unsure "what the future holds for me" after the Los Angeles Lakers are knocked out of the play-offs.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: How many points do you need to stay in the Premier League?
items.summary: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team looks into the number of points needed to avoid relegation from the Premier League
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
